title: rubus colemannii subsp. helveticus
intro: Rubus colemannii subsp. helveticus, also known as Helvetian blackthorn, is a subspecies of the blackthorn plant (Rubus colemannii) native to the Alps in Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its high concentration of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus colemannii subsp. helveticus include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to support overall health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for medicinal purposes.
